productDisplayName: Biotique Women Bio Berberry Refreshing Cleansing Lotion
description: Berberry is an ancient and honoured herb with a history of healing and purifying properties. This refreshing, non-foaming lotion is blended with berberry, red sandalwood, fenugreek, lodhra bark and almond oil to dissolve make-up and grime. Regular use leaves skin feeling soft and smooth.Skin Type- For all skin typesUsage- Apply liberally to face and neck, then massage gently with fingertips twice a day and remove with damp cotton pads.
